name: Boosted Survivors
short_description: Survive waves! Choose new abilities! Modify your hero in any way you like! Craft a powerful masterpiece, or a horrible concoction of awful ideas! Discover secrets! Sandbox your way to victory! Boost! Survive! Boosted Survivors!
detailed_description:
Boosted Survivors is a sandbox rogue-like, filled to the brim with exciting secrets. Fight dangerous waves of enemies, find legendary upgrades, and boost your hero along the way.

Boosting lets you increase or decrease any value of your hero, weapons and abilities, giving you complete freedom to reinterpret the game in new and exciting ways. Every run is completely unique and limited only by your creativity.

Featuring:
  • 12 unique starting weapons and spells.
  • Tons of upgrades to them, but we don't want to spoil just how many.
  • Even more legendary upgrades that give new ways to boost your hero.
  • An intimidating gauntlet of enemies on your journey to the final boss.
  • A global Leaderboard to compete for the spot of top survivor.

Boost your way to victory! Survive against the overwhelming horde! Climb the Leaderboard!
Boost! Survive! Boosted Survivors!
